scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev -w backend" "npm run dev -w frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build -w backend && npm run build -w frontend && npm run build -w cli
scripts.test: npm run test -w backend && npm run test -w frontend && npm run test -w cli
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w backend && npm run lint -w frontend && npm run lint -w cli
